---
applyTo: "src/**"
---

# App Source Instructions

## Overview
The `src/` directory contains the Next.js frontend for the Micha Stocks Fan portal. It is a TypeScript app using the App Router, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint.

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── layout.tsx        # Root layout
│   ├── page.tsx          # Home / course index
│   ├── globals.css       # Global Tailwind styles
│   └── lesson/           # Dynamic lesson pages
├── components/
│   ├── ConceptCard.tsx   # Concept display card
│   ├── CourseBrowser.tsx # Course browser
│   ├── Footer.tsx        # Site footer with disclaimer
│   ├── InlineMarkdown.tsx# Inline markdown renderer
│   └── VideoPlayer.tsx   # YouTube embed player
└── data/
    ├── course.json       # Auto-generated — do not edit manually
    ├── sections.json     # Auto-generated — do not edit manually
    └── sections.ts       # Runtime interface for section data
```

## Rules
- **Always use TypeScript** — no plain `.js` files in `src/`.
- Use **PascalCase** for component filenames and exports (e.g., `ConceptCard.tsx`).
- Style with **Tailwind CSS utility classes** — avoid inline styles or separate CSS files unless absolutely necessary.
- Keep components in `src/components/`. Page-level code belongs in `src/app/`.
- `src/data/course.json` is auto-generated by the pipeline — never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.json` is auto-generated by the data pipeline — never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.ts` imports from `sections.json` and exports `SECTIONS`, `LESSON_SECTION`, `SECTION_COLORS`, and helper functions — it is the runtime interface for section data.
- Follow the **App Router** conventions (file-based routing, `layout.tsx`, `page.tsx`).
- Run ESLint before committing: `npm run lint`.

## Dev Commands
```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Start dev server (http://localhost:3000)
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Serve the production build
npm start

# Run ESLint
npm run lint
```
